prompt: Generate a screenshot of a grocery shop website that exclusively sells fruits. Display the fruit from the first image priced at $10 per kilo, the fruit from the second image priced at $20 per kilo, and the fruit from the third image priced at $30 per kilo. Each fruit should appear as a product card with image, price tag, and an 'Add to Cart' button.
prompt_refined:
Generate a screenshot of a clean, modern grocery website designed exclusively for selling fruits. The main display area should feature three distinct product cards arranged prominently in a horizontal row.

- The first product card, positioned on the left, should showcase the red apple from image 1, clearly displaying its image, a price tag indicating '$10 per kilo', and an 'Add to Cart' button.
- The second product card, located in the center, should showcase the bunch of bananas from image 2, clearly displaying its image, a price tag indicating '$20 per kilo', and an 'Add to Cart' button.
- The third product card, positioned on the right, should showcase the pineapple from image 3, clearly displaying its image, a price tag indicating '$30 per kilo', and an 'Add to Cart' button.
objects: Screenshot of a clean, modern grocery website
Three distinct product cards in a horizontal row
Product card on the left displaying a red apple (from image 1)
Price tag '$10 per kilo' on the left product card
'Add to Cart' button on the left product card
Product card in the center displaying a bunch of bananas (from image 2)
Price tag '$20 per kilo' on the center product card
'Add to Cart' button on the center product card
Product card on the right displaying a pineapple (from image 3)
Price tag '$30 per kilo' on the right product card
'Add to Cart' button on the right product card
